scripts.test:parabank: npx playwright test --project=setup-parabank && npx playwright test --project=parabank
scripts.test:restful-booker: cd 02_api/restful-booker && newman run collection.json -r allure2 --reporter-allure2-export outputs/allure-results && cd ../../
scripts.test:orange-hrm: cd 03_saas/orange-hrm && npx playwright test && robot -d outputs/allure-results robot-tests/ && cd ../../
scripts.test:all: npm run test:parabank && npm run test:restful-booker && npm run test:orange-hrm
scripts.report:all: npm run report:parabank && npm run report:restful-booker && npm run report:orange-hrm
scripts.test:parabank:allure: npm run test:parabank && npm run report:parabank
scripts.test:restful-booker:allure: npm run test:restful-booker && npm run report:restful-booker
scripts.test:orange-hrm:allure: npm run test:orange-hrm && npm run report:orange-hrm
